unique_vulnerabilities.name: Unchecked return value in withdrawBalance()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings reference the unchecked return value of an external call in the withdrawBalance() function on line 14.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Transaction Order Dependence in withdrawBalance()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding describes a race condition vulnerability related to transaction order dependence in the withdrawBalance() function.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings highlight the use of an outdated Solidity version with known issues.
